center.name: Sir William Jardine, 7th Baronet
center.summary: Sir William Jardine, 7th Baronet是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括纯褐鹱、巨嘴拟啄木鸟、Paramo ground tyrant等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The paramo ground tyrant (Muscisaxicola alpinus), more widely known as the plain-capped ground-tyrant, is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and possibly Peru.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-fronted chat (Epthianura albifrons) is a species of bird in the honeyeater family Meliphagidae native to southern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The toucan barbet (Semnornis ramphastinus) is a barbet native to western Ecuador and Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: P.]], South Africa | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Turdoides | species = bicolor | authority = (Jardine, 1831) | synonyms = }} The southern pied babbler (Turdoides bicolor) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae, found in dry savannah of Botswana, Namibia, South Africa, and Zimbabwe

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The orange-bellied leafbird (Chloropsis hardwickii) is a bird native to the central and eastern Himalayas, Yunnan and northern parts of Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Bulwer's petrel (Bulweria bulwerii) is a small petrel in the family Procellariidae that is found in tropical and subtropical regions of the Atlantic, Indian and Pacific Oceans
